texto: There are two goddesses in your heard. The Goddess of Wisdom and the Goddess of Wealth. Everyone thinks they need to get wealth first, and wisdom will come. So they concern themselves with chasing money. But they have it backwards. You have to give your heart to the Goddess of Wisdom, giver her all your love and attention, and the Goddess of Wealth will become jealous, and follow you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Joe Vigil sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “There are two goddesses in your heard. The Goddess of Wisdom and the Goddess of Wealth. Everyone …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, ambition, born-to-run, útil em momentos de born-to-run e christopher-mcdougall.

frase_original: There are two goddesses in your heard. The Goddess of Wisdom and the Goddess of Wealth. Everyone thinks they need to get wealth first, and wisdom will come. So they concern themselves with chasing money. But they have it backwards. You have to give your heart to the Goddess of Wisdom, giver her all your love and attention, and the Goddess of Wealth will become jealous, and follow you.
